answer: Fathom Analytics does not offer a permanent free tier; access requires a paid subscription starting at $15 per month, which includes API access for all plans [1][2][3]. You can start with a 7-day free trial to test the service [1][2]. Once on a paid plan, API access is self-serve, and you can upgrade your API tier via your billing settings [4]. API usage is authenticated using keys generated in your account settings [5]. Please note that Fathom Analytics (analytics for websites) and Fathom AI (meeting assistant) are separate products with different pricing models; Fathom AI does offer a free-forever plan [6].
